title: cyclosorus friesii
intro: Cyclosorus friesii, also known as the Fries' fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus friesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically dried and used to make teas or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
